articles.description: The defamation complaint alleges that Mr. Gandhi made statements against Savarkar on multiple occasions, including a speech on March 5, 2023, at the Overseas Congress event in the United Kingdom.

articles.title: NCLAT upholds NCLT order on distribution of funds from a resolution plan
articles.description: A two-member NCLAT bench said the distribution mechanism for funds is valid, lawful, and binding

articles.title: Sri Krishna Sweets trademark dispute: Madras High Court refuses to summon Deputy Registrar
articles.description: Justice Senthilkumar Ramamoorthy says, no useful purpose would be served in summoning the Deputy Registrar of Trademarks to tender evidence regarding a mark registered in 1988

topStories.description: Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif played a crucial role as a mediator in bringing about US-Iran ceasefire. His diplomatic efforts, along with those of Field Marshal Asim Munir, have led to calls for a Nobel Peace Prize recognition.

dailyNews.description: Trump announced a fragile two-week ceasefire with Iran, allowing passage through the Strait of Hormuz. However, the main shipping lane remains dangerous due to sea mines, prompting Iran to advise alternative routes.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day: Ex-Iraqi President Saddam Hussein on world politics - ‘The west need someone to tell the man…’
dailyNews.description: Saddam Hussein was Iraq's President from 1979 to 2003, known for his authoritarian rule and human rights abuses. He oversaw major conflicts, was removed by a U.S.-led invasion in 2003, captured, and executed in 2006 for crimes against humanity.

dailyNews.title: Trump says US forces to stay near Iran, ready for ‘next conquest’
dailyNews.description: US threats against Iran and ongoing Israeli attacks in Lebanon cast doubt on fragile ceasefire efforts.

dailyNews.title: Did Trump's officials threaten Catholic Church? Vatican cancels White House’s invitation to host Pope Leo XIV
dailyNews.description: The US government under Trump threatened Catholic Church due to which Vatican postponed White House’s invitation to host Pope Leo XIV indefinitely. The Vatican viewed US official's comments as intimidation, prompting a reevaluation of diplomatic relations.

dailyNews.title: Karnataka bypolls at 9 am: 9% polling in Davanagere South, 11.87% in Bagalkot
dailyNews.description: The polls were necessitated in Bagalkot and Davanagere South by the deaths of senior Congress MLAs H.Y. Meti and Shamanur Shivashankarappa respectively

dailyNews.title: ‘Lebanon not part of the deal?’ Conflicting claims puts Iran-US, Israel truce in danger - Here's who said what
dailyNews.description: The ceasefire between Iran and the US is deteriorating as tensions rise over Israeli strikes in Lebanon. Both nations had claimed victory after agreeing to a truce, but Israel's actions have led to threats of renewed hostilities from Iran and Hezbollah.

dailyNews.title: For Gulf states, Hormuz uncertainty casts shadow over fragile US-Iran truce
dailyNews.description: Experts say Gulf states wary US could agree to deal giving Iran leverage over strategic energy waterway.

dailyNews.title: Russia offers South Asian countries sanctioned LNG at 40% discount amid war-induced energy crisis: Report
dailyNews.description: While Russia has been steadily expanding exports from its US-sanctioned export plants — Arctic LNG 2 and Portovaya — most buyers remain wary of taking restricted shipments out of fear of retaliation from Washington.

dailyNews.title: Falcons lineman Kaleb McGary suddenly retires at 31 after missing last season with injury, agent says
dailyNews.description: Atlanta Falcons starting right tackle Kaleb McGary announces his retirement after six seasons and 92 starts, according to his agent Collin Roberts.

dailyNews.title: How skipping prom led Scarlett Bordeaux on path to pro wrestling stardom
dailyNews.description: Scarlett Bordeaux told Fox News Digital how she went from setting up chairs at indie shows to competing in WWE and now Major League Wrestling as a pro wrestler.

dailyNews.title: WATCH: Son of former top Iranian official seen living comfortable life in Los Angeles
dailyNews.description: Photos obtained by Fox News Digital show the son of ex-Iran hostage crisis spokesperson living comfortable Western lifestyle in California life as calls grow for him to be deported.

topStories.description: Trump employed delay tactics to avoid following through on his pledges to relentlessly bomb Iran, following a pattern similar to his 11th-hour tariff compromises.

topStories.description: After careening from one diplomatic extreme to another, President Trump finds himself with a fragile deal that is already showing signs of fraying.

topStories.description: ArcelorMittal, a European steel maker, is donating tens of millions of dollars of foreign steel for President Trump’s new ballroom.

dailyNews.description: A growing chorus of disaffected Trump supporters is sounding off in the replies to his posts on the social media platform he founded.

dailyNews.title: Iran accuses U.S. of violating ceasefire amid Israeli attacks on Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Iran says Israel is violating the ceasefire deal President Trump announced, and Tehran appears to still have control over shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: 4/8: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: U.S.-Iran ceasefire in fragile place; NATO chief Mark Rutte meets with President Trump at the White House.

dailyNews.title: Judge postpones termination of TPS for Ethiopians in U.S.
dailyNews.description: It's the latest setback for the Trump administration on the issue, which has sought to terminate the TPS designation for 13 countries as part of the president's crackdown on immigration.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. ready for 'next conquest,' warns military to remain near Iran until 'real agreement' is honored
dailyNews.description: The statement came a day after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, which halted six weeks of fighting.

dailyNews.title: 'Poorly run, piece of ice': Trump targets Greenland again as Iran war deepens NATO rift
dailyNews.description: Trump has set his eyes on Greenland again while venting frustration at NATO, as the diplomatic fallout from Iran war exposed rifts in the security alliance.

dailyNews.title: Rep. Ritchie Torres calls for probe into futures trades placed ahead of March pause on Iran hostilities
dailyNews.description: Oil and energy futures trading before President Donald Trump announced a pause in Iran attacks in March raises insider trading concerns, Torres told regulators.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Ceasefire between Iran and the U.S. fragile amid continued strikes
dailyNews.description: With a fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran in place, Israel launched its biggest attacks yet against Iran-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon. Iran says Lebanon is part of the ceasefire, while the U.S. and Israel say it is not. The White House announced Vice President J.D. Vance will travel to Pakistan for negotiations with Iran. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.
